violations.text: Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified with RIDOH Center for Food Protection in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC left with CFSM application and to send proof of submitted application to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. PIC instructed that employees must test the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution every time they refill the three bay sink or red sanitizer buckets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
